chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Bail Application No.S- 1276 of 2025 Criminal Bail Application No.S- 1329 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 17.11.2025. Miss Sadaf Nafees, Advocate for applicant in Criminal Bail Application No.S-1329/2025. Mr. Khalid Hussain Lakho, D.P.G for State. = Counsel for the applicant submits that inadvertently this 2nd bail application No.S-1329/2025 follows up on an earlier bail application i.e. Criminal Bail Application No.S-1276/2025. Hence she requests that this 2nd bail application may be withdrawn and moves oral motions to that extent and has also filed such application in this regard. Request accepted. Accordingly, the 2nd bail application No.S-1329/2025 is dismissed as withdrawn. However, Criminal Bail Application No.S-1276/2025 be fixed after two weeks. JUDGE Tufail
